surviving_mutants.description: _strip_comment: remove break after prefix match -- prefix list ordering means no prefix is a substring of another after stripping, so break is unreachable in practice
_strip_comment: remove break after suffix match -- suffix list has no overlapping entries, so break is unreachable in practice
get_body_below_header: change end_line < 1 to end_line < 0 -- the second condition (end_line <= body_start + 1) already catches end_line=0 for all valid body_start values
parse_header: return concrete_manifest even when empty dict -- no test creates a scenario where concrete-manifest line exists but all entries are malformed (producing empty dict vs None)
get_body_below_header: don't skip blank lines in header scan -- test_get_body_below_header_blank_lines_in_header_skipped doesn't verify that header lines after blanks are excluded from body

edge_case_findings.detail: compute_hash handles embedded null bytes correctly
parse_header handles regex metacharacters in body without error
spaces-only, tabs-only, and newlines-only all hash identically (strip to empty)
spec-hash with non-12-char value correctly returns None for spec_hash field
HTML comment on line 1 + C-style on line 2 both parsed correctly
end_line=-5 triggers warning and returns full body as fallback
UTF-8 BOM prefix does not prevent header detection (BOM stripped by comment prefix matching)
